title: S3 operations should verify bucket ownership using expected bucket owner parameter
description: This rule checks for S3 operations that do not use the 'expected_bucket_owner' parameter to verify the bucket ownership.
recommendation: Use the 'expected_bucket_owner' parameter when performing S3 operations.

noncompliant.description: Deleting an S3 object without the expected_bucket_owner parameter.

compliant.description: Deleting an S3 object with the expected_bucket_owner parameter.

why_is_this_an_issue: The expected_bucket_owner parameter is used to verify that the bucket owner is the intended user, preventing unauthorized access.
how_to_fix: Include the expected_bucket_owner parameter when performing S3 operations.

metadata.title: S3 operations should verify bucket ownership using expected bucket owner parameter
